title: HX3 9HL, Waterside Colours Limited: permit surrender issued - EPR/NP3533YZ/S003
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter and decision document for:   Operator name: Waterside Colours Limited Installation name: Waterside Colours Manufacture Permit number: EPR/NP3533YZ  "
